description: Detect whether a PDF has fillable AcroForm fields (read-only). Wraps pypdf's get_fields().
rules: read-only — opens the PDF, never writes it back
verdict text is written to record_store/check_fillable.txt
needs pypdf at runtime; absent -> graceful no-op note + exit 0
usage: Set PDF_PATH (input .pdf). Output: check_fillable.txt (one of the two verdict lines).
limitation: Only reports presence/absence of an AcroForm; says nothing about field count or layout. Requires pypdf to actually inspect the PDF.
